feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: I moved in with my parents again and this brought my depression from being bad to very bad, to the point where I want to kill myself all the time I'm unmedicated so that might be the problem

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The Blood of Dawnwalker
entry.content: Why would a small dev willingly give publishing rights to fucking Bandai Namco? Don't they know that Bamco is famous for its predatory pricing practices in third world countries? Do they want their game to flop everywhere that's not the USA/EU? Fuck off!

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: DS3
entry.content: DS1: >Silver Knights are functionally extinct and only exist as a sham illusion to make people think Anor Londo is okay >this illusion has been going on for years and years DS3: >Everyone forgot that subtext so Silver Knights are back >And they have super cool new moves! DS3 takes the setting very literally, with no nuance.

entry.title: /b/ Random: it's been 15 years, nothing came of it...people did not offer any kind of actual…
entry.content: it's been 15 years, nothing came of it...people did not offer any kind of actual help, just more pussy footing around the issue...i was totally mistaken in thinking i could change things, i was never going to succeed, every aspect of my life was working against me...even then, i thought i could overcome the odds, and still make a difference...well, turns out i couldn't do that, and if i couldn't do it, then of course nobody else will...humans mean nothing to me at this point, i don't even like t

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >leave a clients new windows 11 perfectly configured >disable tons of garbage, f…

entry.title: /b/ Random: Why are the celeb threads always filled with schizophrenic retards?
entry.content: I don't fucking get it. What is the fucking reason? Every single thread is just filled with some retard talking to himself in a "uwu cutesy" typing style while everyone else screams "YOU'RE JACOB NO *YOU'RE* JACOB NO YOU'RE BEADY PHIMOSIS FART JERKING YOUR COUSIN" word salad retardation and I'm confused and sick of it. Why can't people just be fucking normal and post hot celebs in the hot celeb thread ffs. Why is that so hard?!

entry.title: /b/ Random: My all time favorite pornstar is Lisa Sparxxx. Greatest slut to ever do it hands…
entry.content: My all time favorite pornstar is Lisa Sparxxx. Greatest slut to ever do it hands down. Being a teenager in rural Tennessee in the mid 2000s, she was that bitch. I remember me and all my friends would download any and all Lisa Sparxxx scenes we could get our hands on. I've always enjoyed Gianna Michaels or Sara Jay as well but Lisa was always the best. Anyone else agree?

It's not that Linux doesn't have it's issues, it's that those issues are reso

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /opt/ Omnipotent Pervert Thread #1 You've been given godlike powers despite lack…
entry.content: /opt/ Omnipotent Pervert Thread #1 You've been given godlike powers despite lacking any qualifications. This could be due to genetic mutation, eldritch intervention, a glitch in reality or whatever. I want to know how you plan to selfishly transform and change the world to be in line with your petty sexual fantasies. Post about the embarrassing horny changes you'd make to humanity and reality. Alternatively, post how you'd cope with another anon's new world order. Nothing is too cringe or spergy

entry.title: /g/ Technology: like python but >actually fast and not 'fast after you rewrite it in C' >no GIL …
entry.content: like python but >actually fast and not 'fast after you rewrite it in C' >no GIL >built-in package manager that just works with easily reproducible environments instead of pip/conda... shitfuckery >first class Unicode variable names >you can inspect and generate code without a PhD in ast >zero-cost abstractions Why does noone uses this outside universities

entry.title: /news/ News: Another Trump fuckup flares back up
entry.content: https://www.axios.com/2026/07/07/ir an-resumes-hormuz-attacks-us-offici als Iran's military fired at least two missiles at commercial ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz on Monday night, two U.S. officials tell Axios. The IRGC attacked a third commercial ship on Tuesday morning, a U.S. official said. Why it matters: The reported attacks threaten to unravel a memorandum of understanding signed less than three weeks ago under which Iran agreed to halt attacks in the Strait of Hormuz.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Browsers.
entry.content: So.. I remember years back that browsers when you right clicked did give you a key you cna press to download the selected picture. This was great since not only can oyu save time however also if you use a macro keyboard you can automate this to pressing only 1 button. Now it looks like the new and updooted version have removed this. Why? How do I get this functionality back in any browser? Running a old version is not an option since most websites will block you I presume.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: >be 18, into CS and networking >feel like uni won't be a good place for me >can …
entry.content: >be 18, into CS and networking >feel like uni won't be a good place for me >can learn on my own (reading books and references) But honestly, I am terrified of not being average and not going along with the general direction (which ends in university). >my family's financial situation is not good., but they will understand any choice I make To be honest, I am scared, guys. I would be grateful if we could talk it through to reach a conclusion. And you can also share your own life stories.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Hunter HL2 Appreciation
entry.content: >Memorable introduction >Cool design that utilizes the setting and context of the world >Formidable, but not aggravating to fight >You can use its flechettes against it, while using one of the main selling points of the game (Gravity Gun) >If push comes to shove, you can always just shoot the damn thing >Great and iconic sound design It is a shame that hunters only appear in Episode 2. Would've given the base game significantly more enemy variety.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: what happened to progchan?
entry.content: I am 99% sure i saw progchan on /g/, whether it be a ad or someone posted a link in a thread a few months ago, which is why i started browsing and posting on it. progchan has been down for like a month now, at least? is it coming back? i keep checking weekly... anyone associated with it here lurking on /g/ who can give me more info, and if its coming back?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: I don’t care about your feelings. I don’t care about your “mindfulness”. I don’t…
entry.content: I don’t care about your feelings. I don’t care about your “mindfulness”. I don’t care about your years of sensitivity training that was forced on you during Covid. I don’t give a single solitary fucking shit if Los Angeles and all its smog and all its methamphetamine made you more “enlightened”. I don’t give a shit if you think wrecking your boss’s relationship with his girlfriend of five years because she didn’t like her is in any way acceptable just because “she’s hot”. You deserve misery. You

entry.content: I think the biggest reason electric vehicles are popular with younger people is that you don't need to go to a fucking dealership and listen to some gross scumbag talk about "Heavenly Dream Drive Mode" or whatever the fuck I don't understand how anyone under the age of like 60 could go to a GM or Ford dealership and not feel like they're being milked

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: To the Brazil Anon
entry.content: You can only expect sympathy (or empathy) from others if you are capable of expressing it towards others. If the only stuff you are capable of expressing are a superficial admiration of a very specific group of people, and unfettered, vitriolic hatred towards the vast majority of all humans, then do not expect any good feelings to come towards you. I can empathize with people who feel alone and are in unwelcoming or poor conditions, but not with people who mainly express feelings of hatred towar

entry.title: /o/ Auto: The ideal car
entry.content: Is a light-weight electrical coupé with minimum amount of tracking and the only thing it has is a basic GPS and Spotify on a small screen. Minimum amount of components. Minimum amount of ridiculous technology. Maximum freedom, reliability and RWD power. No need for engine maintenance, no need for yearly services. A car that's truly yours. The only thing that may kill it will be corrosion a few decades down the line.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Post musicians who did great humanitarian work
entry.content: Mike Love's The Beach Boys, quickly gained popularity with their unique sound and became the face of America. But for Mike, it was more than just making good music, it was about sending out a message of love, unity & harmony. It was in the late 60s, during the peak of the civil rights movement, that Love truly emerged as a fearless advocate for anti-racism. He wrote and composed a song called "Student Demonstration Time" which highlighted the struggles and sacrifices of Blacks fighting for their

entry.content: hello preface this is going to be a really dumb question but i used vivaldi and then on a whim i decided to try firefox and i found a cute miku skin for it. but my bf was very insistent about continuing to use vivaldi (he uses brave so idk). like he was actively asking me all of my gripes with it and when i said it felt clunky and slow he went through all of the options to try and make it better. and then when i told him i liked the skin i found on firefox he just said “they have them for vivald

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Natalie Merchant has her own prosaic prosody, with off-kilter guitar accentuatin…
entry.content: Natalie Merchant has her own prosaic prosody, with off-kilter guitar accentuating its eccentric undertow. The whole second side makes politics not love, and sometimes--like when the lottery-playing mom of "Dust Bowl" rubs her fevered youngest down with rubbing alcohol--she brings you there. But somehow I knew that when she got down to cases she'd still be a fuzzy-wuzzy. This is a woman whose song about Africa (called "Hateful Hate," now there's a resonant phrase) brushes by slavery on its way to

entry.title: /g/ Technology: A YouTube channel just revealed that they get $0.002 per YouTube ad shown, that …
entry.content: A YouTube channel just revealed that they get $0.002 per YouTube ad shown, that means that a YouTube premium subscriber would have to watch 7000 videos a month before they become lossmaking to Youtube. It's obvious now that Youtube is working harder than ever to make you watch the ads, as there are approximately 20 million adblocking Firefox users alone, which adds up fast. Expect Youtube to create a DRM scheme that requires verified ad views soon that can't be cryptographically bypassed. Ublock

entry.title: /g/ Technology: im genuinely concerned about the future
entry.content: For 2 thirds of my life. Having a pc was a huge part of my life. Now with inflation, demand price increases and just overall changes to the world structure. Be it ai, cloud computing, surveillance state digital ids etc. I am increasingly worried i will never own a pc again once mine breaks. I stay up at night thinking about this. That i will never own a home. Be priced out of even food that i like. And that if i want a pc its either get rid of my down-payment for a house thats reducing in purcha
